section.heading: Definitions
section.chapeau: As used in this subchapter, the term—

paragraph.content: “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Interior.
“Park” means the Wolf Trap National Park for the Performing Arts established under this subchapter, including the Center.
“Center” means the Filene Center in the Park. Such term includes all real property and fixtures which are within or directly related to the Filene Center.
“Foundation” means the Wolf Trap Foundation for the Performing Arts organized pursuant to the District of Columbia Nonprofit Organization Act.

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: The District of Columbia Nonprofit Corporation Act, referred to in par. (4), is Pub. L. 87–569, Aug. 6, 1962, 76 Stat. 265, which is not classified to the Code.

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 2002—Par. (2). Pub. L. 107–219 substituted “Wolf Trap National Park for the Performing Arts” for “Wolf Trap Farm Park”.
